case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK FSB, A FEDERAL SAVINGS BANK VS. JUAN C. HENRIQUEZ et al

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK FSB, A FEDERAL SAVINGS BANK ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT JAM ENTERTAINMENT INC, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

LAW AND MOTION, 302, PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK FSB'S MOTION FOR ORDER ENTERING JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT PURSUANT TO C.C.P. SECTION 664.6 IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. (TOTAL JUDGMENT IS $11,954.73). PREVAILING PARTY SHALL PREPARE FORM OF ORDER THAT COMPLIES WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK FELICIA GREEN; COURT REPORTER DENISE DOUCETTE, CSR NO. 5963 (302/EHG)

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-07-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Entering Judgment Against Defendant Pursuant To C.C.P. Section 664.6
Off Calendar Apr-30-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK FSB'S Motion For Order Entering Judgment Against Defendant Pursuant To C.C.P. Section 664.6 is Granted. No opposition filed. (Total Judgment is $11,954.73). Prevailing party shall prepare form of order that complies with CRC 3.1312. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Denise Doucette, CSR No. 5963; Dept. 302.
